buckler.name: Buckler

arcane_ward.description: A shield etched with runes that improve spell success.

sturdy_targe.description: A combat shield designed for endurance.

dragon_scale_shield.name: Dragon Scale Shield
dragon_scale_shield.description: A legendary shield made from the scales of a red dragon.
